pageContext.name: Birds of Prey: Huntress
pageContext.description: Do you know who I am?   Sideshow Art Prints presents the Birds of Prey: Huntress Fine Art Print, a cinematic DC Comics art print by artist Tula Lotay.  She calls herself Huntress — f#!%ing fabulous, if you ask us! Inspired by actress Mary Elizabeth Winstead's live-action take on Helena Bertinelli in Birds of Prey (And the Fantabulous Emancipation of One Harley Quinn), this colorful portrait absolutely hits the mark — badass, brooding, and not a bow and arrow in sight. She stands with her weapon drawn, ready to fire at the next name on her hit list. Rage issues or sweet revenge? You decide.  Originally created as the cover for Birds of Prey: The Huntress, written by Greg Rucka for DC Comics, this dazzling Birds of Prey artwork is now available for fans in a fine art format. Each Birds of Prey: Huntress Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 300 pieces. Available as an unframed giclée or in a custom framed presentation, this movie Huntress artwork is one target you don't want to miss.  Gather up Gotham's most fantabulous girl gang in your collection when you pair Huntress with the Birds of Prey: Black Canary and Birds of Prey: Harley Quinn art prints by Tula Lotay, sold separately.  Just don't call her the Crossbow Killer! Set your sights on bringing home the Birds of Prey: Huntress Fine Art Print by Tula Lotay.
